key_turning_points.title: Public point split locked into Landlord vs Miner race
Hard closure pivot stabilized TR/board floor but did not catch card-VP gap
Opponent city/animal/card stack conversion outscaled our late VP conversion

counterfactuals.change: Build one additional city anchor by Gen 8 and route greeneries to own city network sooner
Shift one generation earlier from setup cards to direct VP liquidation
Force temperature closure by Gen 10-11 once opponent card-VP ceiling became clear

rule_updates: If opponent projected card_vp is 35 or higher by Gen 8, pivot immediately to forced closure and city-denial lines.
If entering Gen 10+ with 40+ MC and only one global track unfinished, pre-commit to a two-action liquidation plan before passing.
If opponent is likely to lock Banker or Miner by midgame, either commit to contest immediately or ignore and spend actions on guaranteed board/card VP.
